commit_message:
mpl2: guidance regions mpl2: guidance regions Fixes #6200.
This PR updates and exposes the existing guidance regions API that existed inside MPL2 to be used through the Tcl interface.

The user has to set the guides using the command `set_macro_guidance_region`, along with the macro name and region:
`set_macro_guidance_region -macro_name MACRO_1 -region {0 0 100 100}`

The default weight for guidance regions is 10, but it can be adjusted using `-guidance_weight` when calling `rtl_macro_pla

   TESTS
     macro_only
     no_unfixed_macros
+    guides1
+    guides2
 )
 
 # Skipped
examples.before_code:
or_integration_tests(
  "mpl2"
  TESTS
    macro_only
    no_unfixed_macros
)

# Skipped
#mpl2_man_tcl_check
#mpl2_readme_msgs_check

add_subdirectory(cpp)
examples.after_code:
or_integration_tests(
  "mpl2"
  TESTS
    macro_only
    no_unfixed_macros
    guides1
    guides2
)

# Skipped
#mpl2_man_tcl_check
#mpl2_readme_msgs_check

add_subdirectory(cpp)
